$comment: Backfill of agent.params + agent.prompt_hash for submissions that predate the 2026-06-20 SPEC §3 amendment. Authority: derived from each row's recorded scaffold (fleet.json config + audit.py source) + verified channel-default probing 2026-06-20. NOT applied to the record.json itself (records are signed; integrity is preserved). Applied at board-render time only — see openevmbench/board.py::Attempt.effective_agent_*. Tooltips disclose this backfill so reviewers can audit.
